# Fluids

Physiologic Properties of Resuscitation Fluids Osmolarity mOsm/L Bicarb mEq/L Gluconate mEq/L Lactate mEq/L Acetate mEq/L Cl mEq/L Mg mEq/L mg/dL mmol/L

Ca mEq/L mg/dL mmol/L

K mEq/L Na mEq/L

275-295
- - 1.2
- 94-111 0.8-1.0 1.0-1.2 0.4-0.5

2.2-2.6 4.4-5.2 1.1-1.3 3.5-5 135- 145

Plasma

308
- -
- - 154
- -
- 154 Na Cl

273
- - 28
- 109
- 2.7 5.4 1.4 4 130 LR

294
- 23
- 27 98 3.0 3.7 1.5
- 5 140 Plasma- Lyte

283 70
- -
- 72
- -
- 141

0.45% Na Cl + Na Bicarb
